<!-- GENERATED by scripts/render-keyholders-mail-surfaces.mts from src/lib/data/keyholders-mail.ts. Do not edit by hand. -->

# greatfallstoolbus.org

> Great Falls Tool Bus is a static Cloudflare Pages spoke for a shared tool
> library on wheels in Lewiston-Auburn, Maine. Start with AGENTS.md, then use
> the project skills for task-specific behavior.

## Canonical

- [Agent contract](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [README](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/README.md)
- [Repo manifest](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/tinyland.repo.json)
- [Decision packet](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/docs/decisions/0001-gftb-mvp-decisions.md)
- [Gate-opening criteria](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/docs/decisions/0004-gate-opening-criteria.md)
- [Keyholders client setup](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/docs/runbooks/keyholders-client-setup.md)
- [Justfile](https://github.com/Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org/blob/main/Justfile)

## Mail Boundary

- The mailbox receives inbound mail and outbound-signed delivery has been certified with SPF and DKIM.
- The Mailman 3 / Postorius / HyperKitty list runtime is still pending TIN-2380 deployment and list round-trip smoke.
- The HyperKitty archive is intended to be public after the list runtime exists and the archive route is verified.
- The bot-guarded direct-submit form remains TIN-2420 Path B. The static site currently opens a mail draft.

## Agent Routes

- [Agent AX map](https://greatfallstoolbus.org/agent)
- [Machine route map](https://greatfallstoolbus.org/agent-map.md)
- [Sitemap](https://greatfallstoolbus.org/sitemap.xml)

## Operating Constraints

- Use `just <recipe>` for every repo operation.
- Run `just agent-surfaces` after changing keyholders mail data or skills.
- Run gitleaks through Justfile recipes.
- Keep static spokes static. The form endpoint, Mailman runtime, HyperKitty,
  Anubis, DNS, and cluster applies live in the org apply-plane overlay.
